description: Verso, with the address on recto: Letter from Madhkūr to Bū Yaʿqūb Yūsuf. In Judaeo-Arabic, with a ḥamdala in Arabic script at the end. He sends enclosed 1 1/8 dirhams as payment for a half raṭl of syrup (sharāb). Half should be [...] and half rose. If Abū l-Karam should arrive, he should hire a riding animal from Malīj. (Information in part from Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מכתב מאל-מד'כור אל אבו יעקוב יוסף; ביהודית-ערבית עם חמדלה בכתב ערבי; שולח 1 ו-1/8 דירהם עבור חצי רטל שרף
